text.title: Modern BA Framework: BABOK for Agile, AI/ML, Cloud, and Platform Delivery Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml or to the universal skip-this-methodology conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: Which perspective set does the programme require?

conclusion.verdict: Run multi-perspective adaptation; declare each lens explicitly.
Add data + model + evaluation gates to KA-5/KA-6.
Add metric-ownership + lineage requirements to KA-3.
Single-perspective vanilla agile — use knowledge-areas-overview directly.

example.description: When the situation matches the leading branch, apply the referenced rule; otherwise traverse to the next condition until the default branch is reached.
